zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucille Olive Middleton於1502年1月7日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可希勒哈姆時，她的父親William John Middleton34歲，母親Lady Mary Elizabeth Clark30歲。她於1517年與Robert Fisher在英國素福爾可希勒哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1547年4月26日在她的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可希勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucille Olive Middleton于1502年1月7日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可希勒哈姆时，她的父亲William John Middleton34岁，母亲Lady Mary Elizabeth Clark30岁。她于1517年与Robert Fisher在英国素福爾可希勒哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1547年4月26日在她的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可希勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Middleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called. In over thirty instances from many different areas, the name is from Old English midel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. However, Middleton on the Hill near Leominster in Herefordshire appears in Domesday Book as Miceltune, the first element clearly being Old English micel ‘large’, ‘great’ (see Middlebrook ). Middleton Baggot and Middleton Priors in Shropshire have early spellings that suggest gem̄thhyll (from gem̄th ‘confluence’ + hyll ‘hill’) + tūn as the origin. This surname is also found in Scotland and Ireland.

History: A Scottish family of this name derives it from lands at Middleto(u)n near Kincardine. The Scottish physician Peter Middleton practiced in New York City after 1752 and was one of the founders of the medical school at King's College (now Columbia University) in 1767. One of the earliest of the Charleston, SC, Middleton family of prominent legislators was Arthur Middleton, born in Charleston in 1681. The name has also been established in Ireland since at least the 13th century; its presence was reinforced by settlers in the 17th century.

variants.name: Midthun
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of about ten farmsteads in western Norway named Midtun, from Old Norse mith ‘middle’ + tún ‘enclosure, farmstead’. Compare Middleton .

variants.name: Melton
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire, all of which have the same origin as Middleton , with Old English middel replaced by its Old Norse equivalent methal after the Scandinavian settlement of northern and eastern England.

variants.name: Middlebrook
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost Micklebrook in Blackburn (Lancashire), recorded as Mikelbroc in the 13th century. The placename appears to derive from Old English micel ‘big’ + brōc ‘brook, stream’. The surname has undergone a dissimilatory or folk-etymological change from Mickle- to Middle-.

variants.name: Milton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the many places called Milton, or sometimes Middleton (see Middleton ) and occasionally Melton (see Melton ), most of which derive from Old English middel ‘middle’ or myln ‘mill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Lucille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Lucilla  , used also in the English-speaking world. A well-known bearer of the name was the American comedy actress  Lucille Ball  (  1910–89 ).

nameMeanings.name: Olive
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval given name, Oliff(e), derived via French from the Late Latin name Oliva, which was borne by two obscure early saints. It in turn is derived from the Latin name for the olive tree, and was no doubt adopted at first because of the associations of the olive tree with peaceful productivity and fruitfulness; the olive branch has been a symbol of peace since biblical times. Like many names denoting plants and flowers, it was particularly popular in the early decades of the 20th century. See also Olivia .

en.lifeSummary: When Lucille Olive Middleton was born on 7 January 1502, in Syleham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William John Middleton, was 34 and her mother, Lady Mary Elizabeth Clark, was 30. She married Robert Fisher in 1517, in Syleham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 26 April 1547, in her hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Syleham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucille Olive Middleton est née le 7 janvier 1502, à Syleham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William John Middleton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Elizabeth Clark, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Fisher en 1517, à Syleham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 avril 1547, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Syleham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucille Olive Middleton am 7. Januar 1502 in Syleham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William John Middleton 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Mary Elizabeth Clark 30. Sie hat 1517 in Syleham, Suffolk, England Robert Fisher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. April 1547 im Alter von 45 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Syleham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucille Olive Middleton è nata il il 7 gennaio 1502 nel Syleham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William John Middleton, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Lady Mary Elizabeth Clark, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Robert Fisher nel 1517, nel Syleham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 aprile 1547, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Syleham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucille Olive Middletonが1502年1月7日にイギリスイギリススフォルクシレハムで生まれた時，父William John Middletonは34歳，母Lady Mary Elizabeth Clarkは30歳であった。1517年にイギリススフォルクシレハムでRobert Fisherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1547年4月26日に故郷で45歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクシレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucille Olive Middleton(이)가 1502년 1월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 실함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William John Middleton(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mary Elizabeth Clark(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 수폴크 실함에서 Robert Fisher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1547년 4월 26일 그녀의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 실함에 묻혔다.

pt.1502-01-07–1547-04-26: 7 de janeiro de 1502–26 de abril de 1547
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucille Olive Middleton nasceu em 7 de janeiro de 1502, em Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William John Middleton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Elizabeth Clark, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Fisher em 1517, em Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de abril de 1547, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucille Olive Middleton родилась 7 января 1502 г. в местности силэам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William John Middleton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Elizabeth Clark, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Fisher в 1517 г. в местности силэам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 26 апреля 1547 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности силэам, суффолк, Англия.

es.1502-01-07–1547-04-26: 7 de enero de 1502–26 de abril de 1547
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucille Olive Middleton nació el 7 de enero de 1502, en Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William John Middleton, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Elizabeth Clark, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Robert Fisher en 1517, en Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de abril de 1547, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
